text.title: Architecture Workflows Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: ATAM/CBAM workflow instance for "monolith vs microservices" decision — 4 steps with type-1 review gates.

section.title: Scenario
section.p: Phase 3 scale-up looming; CEO wants a defensible decision between staying on the modular monolith or splitting into microservices. Architect, lead engineer, ops lead, and CEO available as stakeholders.

section.title: Output — workflow-instance
